ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences in JSON format */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the user is enrolled in */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the user has earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hotel is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the hotel is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the hotel location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the hotel location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the hotel (scale of 1-5) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status of the hotel (true if available for booking) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Check-in time for the hotel */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Check-out time for the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for which the weather is reported */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the city */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded (in Celsius) */,
  "current_description" TEXT /* Current weather description (e.g., clear sky) */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level (in %) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reserved */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the reservation */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the reservation */,
  "num_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* Room number assigned to the reservation */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room reserved (e.g., single, double) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity record */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., swimming pool) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the amenity (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_amenities_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the destination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership record */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel involved in the partnership */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner organization */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the partnership contract */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the partnership (in %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_partners_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel itinerary */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the itinerary */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination for the itinerary */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trip */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Activities planned during the trip in JSON format */,
  "trip_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_itineraries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_itineraries_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel relevant to the analytics */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the hotel page */,
  "bookings" INTEGER /* Number of bookings made for the hotel */,
  "user_feedback" REAL /* Average user feedback rating for the hotel */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (true if read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking confirmation, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to redeem a reward */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered for redeeming points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., room service, spa) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_services_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., room type, meal preference) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., single room, vegetarian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
